name: Aether Catalyst Solutions, Inc.
summary: Aether Catalyst Solutions, Inc. engages in commercializing patent pending catalyst technology for use in automotive emissions abatement. The company was formerly known as Catcon Technologies Ltd. and changed its name to Aether Catalyst Solutions, Inc. in June 2017. Aether Catalyst Solutions, Inc. was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Burnaby, Canada.
